_comment: Canonical MCP servers, rendered per-agent. Keys per server: targets (required: which agents get it — claude|cursor), os (optional platform filter, e.g. ['win32']), win (optional per-OS override merged on Windows), rendered_name (optional output name). Secrets: use ${ENV_VAR} or op://vault/item/field in any string value — NEVER raw secrets, even in a private fork. Move entries from _examples into mcpServers to enable them.
